paper.title: A study to determine the degree of partial blending of reclaimed asphalt pavement (RAP) binder for high RAP hot mix asphalt
paper.authors: Prashant Shirodkar; Yusuf Mehta; Aaron Nolan; Khyati Sonpal; Alan Norton; Chris Tomlinson; Eric Dubois; Patrick Sullivan; Robert Sauber
paper.notes: Asphalt binder/RAP blending paper; no cementitious compressive-strength data.

evidence.evidence_text: Asphalt binder/RAP blending paper; no cementitious compressive-strength data.
